transcript: The girl discovered a strange lump on her chin. In the mirror, her mouth had taken on a sharp, beak-like shape. She was so scared to scream, but it came out as a chicken's cluck. She found herself uncontrollably pecking at the table. Her feet had also turned into chicken claws. By the time her family found out, she had completely turned into a chicken. Unaware of the truth, her family locked her in the coop. Only her friend, Anne, who witnessed everything knew the truth. The girl had turned into a chicken because she ate candy given by a witch but no one believed her and gradually grew old she lived together with her grandson the blackie one day the witch found blackie sweet she asked tempting the boy with candy in a critical moment and appeared and the witch was scared away the blackie went home and told her he had encountered a strange woman, it was then and explained in detail about the witches, they had split mouths, deformed claws and were naturally bald, they despised children to the extreme, so they used enhanced candy to turn them into animals.
